en: The image is disturbing. Tell them your name.
Are you the real Batman? No. No?
Then why do you dress up like him?
He's a symbol that we don't have to be afraid of scum like you.
Yeah. You do, Brian. You really do.
Yeah. Oh, shush, shush, shush, shush.
So you think Batman's made Gotham a better place?
Look at me. Look at me!
You see, this is how crazy Batman's made Gotham.
If you want order in Gotham, Batman must take off
his mask and turn himself in. Oh, and
every day he doesn't, people will die.
ko: 그가 매일 하지 않는다면, 사람들이 죽을 거야.

en: Starting tonight. I'm a man of my word.
